dslRule.dsl:
functionDeclaration functiondeclaration_1 where
	functiondeclaration_1.body contain ifBlock ifblock_1 where
		and(
			ifblock_1.thenBlock contain synchronizedBlock synchronizedblock_1 where
				synchronizedblock_1.body contain ifBlock ifblock_2 where
					ifblock_2.condition.operator == "==",
			ifblock_1.condition.operator == "=="
		);
dslRule.description: 规则描述信息，需用户修改
